name: Goldfish Gold
description: Goldfish (GGBR) is an on-chain, gold-backed token providing frictionless access to hard-asset security. Each token represents 1/1000th of a troy ounce of gold, held directly on the balance sheet of I-On Digital, a US publicly traded company. Designed as a premier store of value, Goldfish offers a safe harbor against market volatility, fiat inflation, and macroeconomic uncertainty, particularly for crypto-native investors navigating Bitcoin bear cycles.
